note: Curated representative news headlines per country in the three-stories sequence. These are real articles about documented flood events within the 2000-2025 Flood Pulse window; they illustrate the kind of local-news records that news-derived datasets like Google Research's Groundsource extract at scale. Not sourced directly from the Groundsource dataset (which does not expose headlines in its public release).

COD.headline: DR Congo flooding: At least 176 die in South Kivu
Floods kill at least 65 people in DR Congo capital Kinshasa
Congo River floods displace tens of thousands in Kinshasa

BGD.headline: Bangladesh floods leave 4 million people stranded in Sylhet region
Bangladesh floods: At least 23 dead, millions marooned in east
Cyclone Remal leaves at least 16 dead across Bangladesh and India

BRA.headline: Brazil floods: More than 100 dead in Rio Grande do Sul as state reels from unprecedented deluge
Petrópolis death toll rises as mudslides pummel city
Porto Alegre underwater as Rio Grande do Sul floods worst on record
